news.Title: Nvidia, Google Join Pentagon AI Deals for Classified Work
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

Nvidia ( NVDA , Financials ) and Alphabet's Google are among seven technology companies that signed agreements with the Pentagon to deploy artificial intelligence tools in classified settings.

Warning! GuruFocus has detected 5 Warning Signs with NVDA.

Is NVDA fairly valued? Test your thesis with our free DCF calculator.

The agreements also include OpenAI, SpaceX, Microsoft, Amazon Web Services and Reflection AI. The companies will support AI use across classified defense networks, including high-security environments known as Impact Level 6 and Impact Level 7.

The move expands the Pentagon's push to use advanced AI for warfighting, intelligence and enterprise operations. Its GenAI.mil platform has already been used by more than 1.3 million department personnel.

For investors, the deals show how major AI companies are moving deeper into government and defense work. That could create new long-term revenue opportunities, while also raising questions around security, oversight and model access.

The next focus will be how quickly these tools are deployed and whether the Pentagon expands AI partnerships across more defense programs.

news.Title: Nebius Makes $643 Million AI Inference Push With Eigen Deal
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

Nebius Group NV ( NASDAQ:NBIS ) is moving deeper into the AI infrastructure race with a roughly $643 million stock-and-cash agreement to acquire Eigen AI, a California startup focused on improving the performance of chips used to run artificial intelligence workloads. The deal includes about $98 million in cash and 3.8 million Nebius shares, with the valuation based on Nebius's 30-day weighted average stock price. For investors, the acquisition could be an important step in Nebius's push to strengthen its inference business, where the ability to generate more tokens from the same Nvidia chips may become a key competitive edge.

Warning! GuruFocus has detected 6 Warning Signs with NBIS.

Is NBIS fairly valued? Test your thesis with our free DCF calculator.

Eigen is a 20-person startup cofounded by alumni of a prominent MIT AI lab, and its technology works on optimizing the performance of leading open-source models from OpenAI, Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. ( NYSE:BABA ), Meta Platforms Inc. ( NASDAQ:META ) and Nvidia Corp. ( NASDAQ:NVDA ) Roman Chernin, Nebius co-founder and chief business officer, said Eigen's technology maximizes the number of tokens generated by each Nvidia chip Nebius uses for inference, or running AI models. That could help Nebius provide better and cheaper services to customers at a time when AI infrastructure providers are trying to extract more output from expensive compute capacity. Chernin described this race as the Olympic sport of the current market, saying Eigen's team members are like Olympic runners in the discipline and could bring a significant improvement to Nebius's inference business.

Nebius, which split from Russian internet provider Yandex in 2024, is part of the neocloud group renting AI computing capacity to companies such as Microsoft Corp ( NASDAQ:MSFT ). In November, the Amsterdam-based company introduced Token Factory, an inference product that competes with startups including Fireworks and Baseten, as well as larger cloud providers. With data center capacity still tight, Chernin said Nebius is reserving some computing power for Token Factory instead of selling all of it in advance through multiyear deals to large clients, because short-notice contracts can command higher prices and help Nebius add more varied services. The acquisition is Nebius's second in the past three months, following its February deal to buy Tavily, and Chernin said the company is reviewing other opportunities as it looks to buy teams or capabilities that accelerate its strategy, add customer-facing products, and possibly help it become one of the key players in inference over the next 18 months.

news.Title: Will Cisco (CSCO) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
news.Content:
Looking for a stock that has been consistently beating earnings estimates and might be well positioned to keep the streak alive in its next quarterly report? Cisco Systems (CSCO), which belongs to the Zacks Computer - Networking industry, could be a great candidate to consider.

This seller of routers, switches, software and services has seen a nice streak of beating earnings estimates, especially when looking at the previous two reports. The average surprise for the last two quarters was 2.00%.

For the last reported quarter, Cisco came out with earnings of $1.04 per share versus the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $1.02 per share, representing a surprise of 1.96%. For the previous quarter, the company was expected to post earnings of $0.98 per share and it actually produced earnings of $1 per share, delivering a surprise of 2.04%.

Price and EPS Surprise

Thanks in part to this history, there has been a favorable change in earnings estimates for Cisco lately. In fact, the Zacks Earnings ESP (Expected Surprise Prediction) for the stock is positive, which is a great indicator of an earnings beat, particularly when combined with its solid Zacks Rank.

Our research shows that stocks with the combination of a positive Earnings ESP and a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold) or better produce a positive surprise nearly 70% of the time. In other words, if you have 10 stocks with this combination, the number of stocks that beat the consensus estimate could be as high as seven.

The Zacks Earnings ESP compares the Most Accurate Estimate to the Zacks Consensus Estimate for the quarter; the Most Accurate Estimate is a version of the Zacks Consensus whose definition is related to change. The idea here is that analysts revising their estimates right before an earnings release have the latest information, which could potentially be more accurate than what they and others contributing to the consensus had predicted earlier.

Cisco currently has an Earnings ESP of +1.92%, which suggests that analysts have recently become bullish on the company's earnings prospects. This positive Earnings ESP when combined with the stock's Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) indicates that another beat is possibly around the corner.

Investors should note, however, that a negative Earnings ESP reading is not indicative of an earnings miss, but a negative value does reduce the predictive power of this metric.

Many companies end up beating the consensus EPS estimate, though this is not the only reason why their shares gain. Additionally, some stocks may remain stable even if they end up missing the consensus estimate.

Story Continues

Because of this, it's really important to check a company's Earnings ESP ahead of its quarterly release to increase the odds of success. Make sure to utilize our Earnings ESP Filter to uncover the best stocks to buy or sell before they've reported.

news.Title: Microchip Technology (MCHP) Is Up 13.56% in One Week: What You Should Know
news.Content:
Momentum investing is all about the idea of following a stock's recent trend, which can be in either direction. In the "long context," investors will essentially be "buying high, but hoping to sell even higher." And for investors following this methodology, taking advantage of trends in a stock's price is key; once a stock establishes a course, it is more than likely to continue moving in that direction. The goal is that once a stock heads down a fixed path, it will lead to timely and profitable trades.

Even though momentum is a popular stock characteristic, it can be tough to define. Debate surrounding which are the best and worst metrics to focus on is lengthy, but the Zacks Momentum Style Score, part of the Zacks Style Scores, helps address this issue for us.

Below, we take a look at Microchip Technology (MCHP) , which currently has a Momentum Style Score of B. We also discuss some of the main drivers of the Momentum Style Score, like price change and earnings estimate revisions.

It's also important to note that Style Scores work as a complement to the Zacks Rank, our stock rating system that has an impressive track record of outperformance. Microchip Technology currently has a Zacks Rank of #2 (Buy). news.Title: Pentagon expands AI partnerships with major tech firms
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

Alphabet ( NASDAQ:GOOG ) and NVIDIA ( NASDAQ:NVDA ) are getting pulled further into defense work, as the Pentagon brings in a group of major tech companies to run AI tools in classified environments.

The Department of Defense has signed agreements with players like OpenAI, Google, Microsoft ( NASDAQ:MSFT ), Amazon ( NASDAQ:AMZN ) Web Services, Nvidia, SpaceX, and Reflection AI. The idea is to use their models across highly secure systems for things like intelligence, operations, and internal workflows. Adoption is already moving fast, with the Pentagon saying more than 1.3 million personnel are using its AI platform.

Warning! GuruFocus has detected 5 Warning Signs with NVDA.

Is GOOG fairly valued? Test your thesis with our free DCF calculator.

What's interesting is how the Pentagon is approaching this. It's not relying on just one partner. Instead, it's working with several companies at once, which spreads risk but also shows how important AI has become in defense strategy. Not every company has been comfortable with that setup. Anthropic has pushed back in the past over access terms, which gives you a sense of the trade-offs involved.

news.Title: Apple delivers strong quarter with upbeat outlook
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

Apple Inc. ( NASDAQ:AAPL ) put up a strong quarter, but what really stood out wasn't just the numbers, it was the tone of what comes next.

The company beat expectations for fiscal Q2, helped by steady iPhone demand, but the real surprise came with its outlook. Apple is now guiding for 14% to 17% revenue growth next quarter, well ahead of what the Street was expecting. And then there's margins. Gross margins are projected at 47.5% to 48.5%, which is impressive considering memory costs are going up. That was one of the biggest worries coming in, and Apple basically just brushed it aside.

Warning! GuruFocus has detected 5 Warning Signs with NVDA.

Is AAPL fairly valued? Test your thesis with our free DCF calculator.

Analysts picked up on that quickly. There's a growing sense that demand is holding up better than expected, especially across iPhones and Macs. Some of that is also tied to AI-related usage, with devices like the Mac mini and MacBook Neo seeing stronger traction. But beyond products, Apple's scale is doing a lot of the work here. It's managing supply and costs in a way that others are struggling to match.

news.Title: Why Roblox Stock Malfunctioned Today
news.Content:
Roblox Corporation (NYSE: RBLX) stock crashed 15.1% through 11:15 a.m. ET Friday after reporting mixed earnings in its Q1 report last night.

Heading into the quarter, analysts forecast the popular online video game platform would report a $0.41-per-share loss, and the good news is that Roblox lost only $0.35 per share -- an earnings "beat." Bookings forecast to exceed $1.7 billion fell short of that mark, however -- a "miss."

Will AI create the world's first trillionaire? Our team just released a report on the one little-known company, called an "Indispensable Monopoly" providing the critical technology Nvidia and Intel both need. Continue »

Roblox Q1 earnings

Roblox has never earned a profit. According to analysts polled by S&P Global Market Intelligence , Roblox is not expected ever to report a profit, as far out as analysts publish estimates (2030). This forces analysts and investors to focus on numbers other than just the usual "earnings calculated under generally accepted accounting principles" ( GAAP ) when evaluating Roblox stock.

What numbers, precisely?

Sales growth: up 39% to $1.4 billion in Q1 at Roblox.

Bookings (or put another way, anticipated future sales) growth: up 43% to $1.7 billion.

And daily average users growth, up 35%, and hours of gamer engagement -- up 43%.

And of course, the most important number of all: Free cash flow, which for Roblox was $596 million in Q1, up 40% year over year.

What's next for Roblox stock?

Those numbers all look quite good for Roblox, but it was one number in particular that upset investors today, and that was bookings. Turning to guidance, Roblox told investors it expects bookings to grow only to $1.6 billion or so in Q2, and perhaps $7.5 billion through the end of the year. Problem is, Wall Street analysts wanted to see Roblox promise $1.9 billion in Q2 bookings, and $8.4 billion for the year.

Roblox failed to do that.

This is why Roblox stock is down today.

news.Title: Cathie Wood Loads Up on Meta, Alphabet Sells AMD
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

Cathie Wood's ARK Invest added to Meta Platforms ( NASDAQ:META ) and Alphabet ( NASDAQ:GOOG ) positions across several exchange-traded funds on April 30 while trimming Advanced Micro Devices ( NASDAQ:AMD ), according to trade disclosures.

Meta fell about 8% after its latest results as investors focused on a higher 2026 capital spending plan. Alphabet, by contrast, jumped about 10% after strong quarterly results and a bigger AI investment outlook, giving ARK a chance to buy into the volatility. AMD also drew selling from ARK after shares pulled back.

Warning! GuruFocus has detected 2 Warning Sign with META.

Is META fairly valued? Test your thesis with our free DCF calculator.

ARK bought Meta and Alphabet in multiple funds while reducing AMD holdings, signaling a shift toward the two larger AI-linked names after their post-earnings reactions diverged.

AMD had recently climbed sharply on demand tied to agentic AI workloads, but the stock eased after Chief Executive Lisa Su met U.S. Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick to discuss artificial intelligence and U.S. technology leadership. In all, Meta, Alphabet and AMD remained at the center of the rotation for active managers tracking AI exposure this year.

news.Title: Apple beats expectations but flags rising costs
news.Content:
This article first appeared on GuruFocus .

Apple Inc. ( NASDAQ:AAPL ) just delivered a strong quarter, but it's also starting to flag where things could get a bit tougher going forward.

On the earnings call, CEO Tim Cook pointed to memory costs as a growing issue. He said prices are set to be significantly higher in the June quarter and will likely have a bigger impact beyond that. It's been building gradually. The impact was minimal late last year, picked up a bit in the March quarter, and now looks like it's becoming a more meaningful headwind.

Warning! GuruFocus has detected 6 Warning Sign with XOM.

Is AAPL fairly valued? Test your thesis with our free DCF calculator.

That said, the business itself is still holding up well. Apple reported EPS of $2.01 on revenue of $111.18 billion, up 16.5% Y/Y, both ahead of expectations. Margins came in at 49.3%, even with some pressure from tariffs already factored in. The stock was up about 3.2% premarket, which tells you investors are still focused on the demand side, especially with strong iPhone 17 momentum.

news.Title: Intel's Sambanova deal gets U.S. antitrust clearance
news.Content:
By Jody Godoy

May 1 (Reuters) - U.S. ‌antitrust authorities have ‌completed their review of ​Intel's investment in SambaNova, a chip startup chaired by ‌Intel ⁠CEO Lip-Bu Tan, according to a ⁠regulatory notice circulated on Friday.

Intel ​put $35 ​million ​into SambaNova ‌in February, which, along with other financing, boosted Intel’s stake in the startup ‌to 8.2% ​from ​6.8% ​last year.

Intel has ‌planned to invest ​another $15 ​million in SambaNova, Reuters reported ​on ‌April 1.

(Reporting by ​Jody Godoy in ​New York)

news.Title: Apple is nearing its first record close since December after earnings
news.Content:
Apple’s ( AAPL ) shaky breakout attempt is back from the brink.

The iPhone maker is now on track for its first record closing high since Dec. 2, flipping last week’s failed breakout into a fresh test of its all-time high zone.

The move is a sharp reversal from last week’s setup , when Apple’s breakout was already under pressure after the stock slipped back from resistance.

At the time, Apple had three big issues hitting at once: CEO Tim Cook’s planned departure, earnings, and a breakout that was starting to look vulnerable. Friday’s earnings reaction appears to have gone a long way toward easing those succession fears — at least in the stock.

More from Yahoo Scout

What are AAPL's key technical resistance levels?

What drove Apple's stock recovery from failed breakout?

How does Apple compare to other Magnificent Seven stocks?

How did Apple's earnings results exceed analyst expectations?

Apple jumped nearly 5% after stronger-than-expected quarterly results , as the company topped estimates on iPhone and China sales.

That puts the technical picture back in focus.

The old $278 to $280 barrier has turned into the key area to hold, while the $286 to $289 zone marks the next hurdle near Apple’s record highs.

A close in that range would mark Apple’s first record finish in roughly five months — and bring the stock back into the same record-high conversation as Amazon ( AMZN ), Alphabet ( GOOG , GOOGL ), and Nvidia ( NVDA ). All three have already notched record highs in recent days.

Apple had been one of the biggest “Magnificent Seven” laggards since the market’s March 30 low. Now it is helping confirm that the megacap rally is spreading beyond the AI leaders.

Hold above $278 to $280, and the breakout to new highs is alive. Fall back below it, and the failed-breakout risk returns.

Jared Blikre is the global markets and data editor for Yahoo Finance. Follow him on X at @SPYJared or email him at jaredblikre@yahooinc.com .

news.Title: Monolithic Power's Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates on Solid Revenue Growth
news.Content:
Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. MPWR reported strong first-quarter 2026 results, with both adjusted earnings and revenues surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate.

The Kirkland, WA-based company reported a strong 26.1% year-over-year revenue increase, driven by solid demand in enterprise data and communications. Growth was supported by higher adoption of power solutions for AI servers, optical modules and networking equipment. Its diversified strategy and new customer wins also helped maintain growth across segments.

Net Income

Net income, on a GAAP basis, was $193.2 million or $3.92 per share compared with $135.1 million or $2.81 per share in the year-ago quarter. Top-line growth boosted the bottom line during the quarter.

Non-GAAP net income improved to $251.3 million or $5.10 per share from $193.8 million or $4.04 per share in the prior-year quarter. The bottom line surpassed the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 21 cents.

Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. Price, Consensus and EPS Surprise

Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. price-consensus-eps-surprise-chart | Monolithic Power Systems, Inc. Quote

Revenues

Monolithic Power generated revenues of $804.2 million, up from $637.6 million in the year-ago quarter, primarily driven by solid growth in the Enterprise Data market, representing 32.7% of total revenues in the first quarter of 2026. The top line beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $781.1 million.

By end markets, Enterprise Data increased to $262.8 million from $132.9 million in the year-ago quarter, owing to higher sales of power management solutions for AI and server applications. Net sales from Storage and Computing revenues were $174.4 million, down 7.5% year over year. In the first quarter, the Automotive end market contributed $152.4 million in revenues, up 5.1% year over year due to higher sales of Advanced Driver Assistance Systems power solutions.

Industrial revenues were $48.6 million compared with $42.6 million in the year-ago quarter. The Communications end market registered $111.5 million in revenues, up from $71.8 million, driven by higher sales of power solutions for optical modules and switches. Net sales from the Consumer end market decreased to $54.5 million from $56.9 million in the year-ago quarter.

Other Details

Non-GAAP gross margin was 55.5% compared with 55.7% in the year-earlier period. Non-GAAP operating expenses were $158.3 million compared with $133.5 million reported a year ago. Non-GAAP operating income was $288 million, up from $221.5 million, owing to higher revenues.

Cash Flow & Liquidity

During the March quarter, the company generated an operating cash flow of $250.3 million compared with $256.4 million in the prior-year quarter. As of March 31, 2026, cash and cash equivalents and short-term investments totaled $1.37 billion, with other long-term liabilities of $119.2 million.

Story Continues

Zacks Rank

Monolithic Power currently carries a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy). You can see the complete list of today’s Zacks #1 Rank (Strong Buy) stocks here .

Upcoming Releases

Arista Networks Inc. ANET is scheduled to release first-quarter 2026 earnings on May 5. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for earnings is pegged at 81 cents per share, suggesting growth of 24.62% from the year-ago reported figure.

Arista has a long-term earnings growth expectation of 17.94%. The company delivered an average earnings surprise of 9% in the last four reported quarters.

CDW Corporation CDW is set to release first-quarter 2026 earnings on May 6. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for earnings is pegged at $2.28 per share, implying growth of 6.05% from the year-ago reported figure.

CDW has a long-term earnings growth expectation of 7.25%. The company delivered an average earnings surprise of 5.72% in the last four reported quarters.

Motorola Solutions, Inc. MSI is set to release first-quarter 2026 earnings on May 7. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for earnings is pegged at $3.25 per share, implying growth of 2.2% from the year-ago reported figure.

Motorola has a long-term earnings growth expectation of 9.4%. The company delivered an average earnings surprise of 5.66% in the last four reported quarters.

news.Title: Stocks Supported by Apple’s Earnings and Weaker Crude Prices
news.Content:
The S&P 500 Index ($SPX) (SPY) today is up +0.55%, the Dow Jones Industrial Average ($DOWI) (DIA) is up +0.28%, and the Nasdaq 100 Index ($IUXX) (QQQ) is up +0.79%. June E-mini S&P futures (ESM26) are up +0.58%, and June E-mini Nasdaq futures (NQM26) are up +0.80%.

Stock indexes are mixed today, with the S&P 50 and Nasdaq 10 posting new all-time highs and the Dow Jones Industrials posting a 2.5-month high. The broader market is finding support today from Apple, which is up more than +4% after forecasting stronger-than-expected revenue for Q2. Also, Atlassian is up more than +25% to lead software stocks higher after reporting stronger-than-expected Q3 revenue. In addition, crude oil prices fell today, temporarily easing inflation concerns.

More News from Barchart

Warren Buffett Says the 2026 Stock Market Dip Isn’t Big Enough: ‘If There is a Big Decline, We Will Deploy’ Capital

AMD Stock Just Got a New Street-High Price Target. Should You Buy Shares Here?

S&P 500 and Nasdaq 100 Rally to Record Highs on Earnings Optimism

Markets move fast. Keep up by reading our FREE midday Barchart Brief newsletter for exclusive charts, analysis, and headlines.

The weakness in AI infrastructure stocks is limiting gains in the Nasdaq 100, despite SanDisk reporting Q3 results that beat expectations, as analysts said the results may not have been strong enough to meet high investor expectations.

WTI crude oil prices (CLM26) gave up an early advance today and are down more than -1% after Axios reported that Iran delivered its response to the latest US amendments on the agreement to end the war. Crude prices initially moved higher today after President Trump said he was sticking with a naval blockade of Iran, and Iran’s Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, vowed not to give up Iran’s nuclear or missile technologies and said Iran would keep control of the Strait of Hormuz.

The Strait of Hormuz remains essentially closed, as about a fifth of the world’s oil and liquefied natural gas transits through the strait. Goldman Sachs estimates that the current disruption has drawn down nearly 500 million bbl from global crude stockpiles, with the drawdown potentially reaching 1 billion bbl by June.

The markets are discounting an 8% chance of a -25 bp FOMC rate cut at the next FOMC meeting on June 16-17.

Earnings season ramps up this week with several Magnificent Seven technology stocks reporting. Earnings results thus far have been supportive of stocks. As of today, 81% of the 303 S&P 500 companies that reported Q1 earnings have beaten estimates. Q1 S&P 500 earnings are projected to climb +12% y/y, according to Bloomberg Intelligence. Stripping out the technology sector, Q1 earnings are projected to increase around +3%, the weakest in two years.

Story Continues

Overseas stock markets are higher today. The Euro Stoxx 50 and China's Shanghai Composite did not trade, with markets in Europe and China closed for the Labor Day holiday. Japan's Nikkei Stock Average closed up +0.38%.

Interest Rates

June 10-year T-notes (ZNM6) today are up by +4 ticks. The 10-year T-note yield is up +2.3 bp to 4.394%. T-notes are under pressure today from rising inflation expectations, as the 10-year breakeven inflation rate rose to a 14.5-month high of 2.50%. Losses in T-notes are limited, as crude prices gave up an early advance and fell more than -1%.

European government bond yields are mixed today. The 10-year German bund yield did not trade with European markets closed for the Labor Day holiday. The 10-year UK gilt yield is down -1.9 bp to 4.993%.

ECB Governing Council member and Bundesbank President Joachim Nagel said the ECB will need to increase interest rates in June if "the inflation outlook does not improve markedly."

Swaps are discounting an 89% chance of a +25 bp ECB rate hike at its next policy meeting on June 11.

US Stock Movers

Apple (AAPL) is up more than +4% to lead gainers in the Dow Jones Industrials after reporting Q2 revenue of $111.18 billion, better than the consensus of $109.66 billion, and forecasting Q3 revenue up +14% to +17%, well above the consensus of +9.1%.

Atlassian (TEAM) is up more than +25% to lead software stocks higher after reporting Q3 revenue of $1.79 billion, stronger than the consensus of $1.69 billion. Also, Datadog (DDOG) is up more than +4% to lead gainers in the Nasdaq 100, and Salesforce (CRM), Workday (WDAY), Oracle (ORCL), and ServiceNow (NOW) are up more than +3%, and Autodesk (ADSK) and Intuit (INTU) are up more than +2%.

AI-infrastructure stocks are lower today after SanDisk reported Q3 results that beat expectations, but analysts said the results may not have been strong enough to meet high investor expectations. As a result, Qualcomm (QCOM), KLA Corp (KLAC), and Western Digital (WDC) are down more than -2%. Also, NXP Semiconductors NV (NXPI), Analog Devices (ADI), Marvell Technology (MRVL), Lam Research (LRCX), and Texas Instruments (TXN) are down more than -1%.

Twilio (TWLO) is up more than +19% after reporting Q1 revenue of $1.41 billion, above the consensus of $1.34 billion, and raising its full-year organic revenue forecast to up +9.5% to +10.5% from a previous estimate of +8% to +9%, stronger than the consensus of +8.7%.

Veeva Systems (VEEV) is up more than +11% after S&P Dow Jones Indices said the company will replace Coterra Energy in the S&P 500, beginning with the start of trading on Thursday, May 7.

Reddit (RDDT) is up more than +7% after reporting Q2 adjusted Ebitda of $266.0 million, above the consensus of $221.3 million.

Estee Lauder (EL) is up more than +6% to lead gainers in the S&P 500 after reporting Q3 net sales of $3.71 billion, better than the consensus of $3.69 billion, and raising its full-year organic net sales forecast to +3% from a prior view of +1% to +3%, stronger than the consensus of +2.84%.

Roblox (RBLX) is down by more than -19% after reporting Q1 daily active users of 132 million, below the consensus of 143.8 million.

Clorox (CLX) is down more than -8% to lead losers in the S&P 500 after cutting its full-year adjusted EPS forecast to $5.45 to $5.65 from a previous forecast of $5.95 to $6.30, weaker than the consensus of $5.92.

Amgen (AMGN) is down more than -4% to lead losers in the Dow Jones Industrials and Nasdaq 100 after reporting Q1 product sales of $8.22 billion, below the consensus of $8.23 billion.

Floor & Decor (FND) is down more than -1% after cutting its full-year EPS forecast to $1.83 to $2.08 from a previous forecast of $1.98 to $2.18.

Earnings Reports(5/1/2026)

AES Corp/The (AES), Affiliated Managers Group Inc (AMG), Aon PLC (AON), Ares Management Corp (ARES), AutoNation Inc (AN), Brookfield Renewable Corp (BEPC), Cboe Global Markets Inc (CBOE), Chevron Corp (CVX), Church & Dwight Co Inc (CHD), Colgate-Palmolive Co (CL), Dominion Energy Inc (D), Estee Lauder Cos Inc/The (EL), Exxon Mobil Corp (XOM), Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT), Gates Industrial Corp PLC (GTES), HF Sinclair Corp (DINO), Lazard Inc (LAZ), Lear Corp (LEA), Liberty Global Ltd (LBTYA), Linde PLC (LIN), LyondellBasell Industries NV (LYB), Madison Square Garden Sports Corp (MSGS), Moderna Inc (MRNA), Newell Brands Inc (NWL), nVent Electric PLC (NVT), OneMain Holdings Inc (OMF), Summit Therapeutics Inc (SMMT), TPG Inc (TPG).

news.Title: Lam Research (LRCX) Recently Broke Out Above the 20-Day Moving Average
news.Content:
After reaching an important support level, Lam Research (LRCX) could be a good stock pick from a technical perspective. LRCX surpassed resistance at the 20-day moving average, suggesting a short-term bullish trend.

The 20-day simple moving average is a well-liked trading tool because it provides a look back at a stock's price over a 20-day period. Additionally, short-term traders find this SMA very beneficial, as it smooths out short-term price trends and shows more trend reversal signals than longer-term moving averages.

Like other SMAs, if a stock's price is moving above the 20-day, the trend is considered positive. When the price falls below the moving average, it can signal a downward trend.

LRCX has rallied 18.1% over the past four weeks, and the company is a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) at the moment. This combination suggests LRCX could be on the verge of another move higher.

The bullish case only gets stronger once investors take into account LRCX's positive earnings estimate revisions. There have been 12 revisions higher for the current fiscal year compared to none lower, and the consensus estimate has moved up as well.

With a winning combination of earnings estimate revisions and hitting a key technical level, investors should keep their eye on LRCX for more gains in the near future.

However, Meta is the only one of those four companies that doesn't have a cloud computing business ...
news.AI_Summary:
• Meta Platforms (META) is increasing capital expenditures to over $100 billion this year for AI ambitions, causing its stock to plunge.
• Unlike peers like Amazon, Alphabet, and Microsoft, Meta does not have a cloud computing business to directly monetize AI spending.
• Meta's Reality Labs division lost $4 billion in Q1 on $402 million in revenue.
• Meta's core advertising business accelerated, with revenue jumping 33% in Q1, driven by AI improvements in ad targeting and content.

news.Title: 【含積ETF比一比2】今年績效前20強出爐！00981A、00992A等8檔主動式ETF入列 「這檔」狂飆74%奪冠
news.Content:
台積電（2330）近期在AI產業熱潮與政策利多加持下，股價一度衝上2,330元新天價，帶動市場資金湧入「含積ETF」，掀起新一波「拉積盤」行情。《Yahoo股市》統整今年來績效表現最強的20檔含積台股ETF，其中富邦台灣半導體（00892）受惠半導體族群強勢表現，今年來大漲74.54%奪冠，另有包括主動統一台股增長（00981A）、主動群益科技創新（00992A）等8檔主動式ETF同步入列，整體漲幅均達4成以上。

金管會近期政策拍板，放寬台股基金與主動式ETF投資單一個股上限至25%，由原先10%大幅鬆綁，等同替主動式ETF開一道門。市場普遍解讀，此舉將為台積電等績優龍頭帶來更具延續性的資金動能，不僅主動式ETF直接受惠，連帶具高含積比重的被動型ETF也可望同步吸金，推升新一波「拉積盤」行情。

《Yahoo股市》統計今年來績效表現最強的20檔含積台股ETF，漲幅均4成起跳，且前三名更衝上7成以上水準。其中，富邦台灣半導體（00892）受惠AI浪潮持續推升半導體資本支出，帶動相關企業營運動能升溫，加上AI晶片、先進製程與高效能運算需求快速成長，連帶推升測試需求，促使全球探針卡市場維持強勁擴張。由於00892同時涵蓋探針卡族群，成為另一大投資亮點，今年來飆漲74.54%，穩居績效冠軍。

第二名為野村臺灣新科技50（00935），以半導體與次世代通訊為兩大核心布局，聚焦先進製程、記憶體、電源管理等半導體族群，並搭配高速傳輸、低軌衛星與資料中心建設等通訊題材，今年來大漲71.12%；主動統一台股增長（00981A）則以70.67%漲幅躋身第三名，自去年5月底掛牌以來績效表現優異，經理人陳釧瑤更被廣大網友封為「瑤池金母」，引發市場熱議，截至4月30日，規模來到2369.8億元，續創新高。

值得留意的是，本次前20強中共有8檔主動式ETF入列，除了00981A之外，還有主動第一金台股優選（00994A）、主動群益科技創新（00992A）、主動台新優勢成長（00987A）、主動中信台灣卓越（00995A）、主動復華未來50（00991A）、主動野村台灣50（00985A）與主動群益台灣強棒（00982A），全數繳出逾4成漲幅佳績。

馮萱榕／財經特派記者，主跑財政部、電腦通路、觀光餐飲等

news.Title: 【含積ETF比一比1】台積電太貴買不下手？一表看台股ETF「含積量」前20名 6檔股價不到30元
news.Content:
金管會放寬基金與主動式ETF單一個股投資上限至25%的「台積電條款」正式上路，激勵台積電（2330）股價於4月27日衝上2,330元歷史高點，也讓「高含積ETF」成為市場追價焦點。《Yahoo股市》盤點「含積量」前20名台股ETF一次看，其中以有「小台積」之稱的富邦科技（0052）持有近7成最具代表性；同時鎖定「含積量」至少3成以上、目前股價不到30元的「高積低價」ETF，共有6檔順勢出線，適合小資族輕鬆入手。

0052台積電比重68.57%居「含積ETF」之冠

隨著AI伺服器、半導體與高效能運算需求擴大，台股企業盈餘持續上修，推動大盤屢創新高。觀察台股ETF中，共有48檔成分股中有台積電，進一步篩選持有權重前20名，以富邦科技（0052）持有68.57%居冠；其次為富邦台50（006208）與元大台灣50（0050），權重分別為61.55%、61.53%。其餘包括富邦公司治理（00692）、元大MSCI台灣（006203）、富邦摩台（0057）、元大電子（0053），含積量皆超過5成。

以持有張數來看，0050持有台積電高達47萬張遙遙領先，006208亦持有逾11萬張，位列第二名。

6檔股價不到30元！009816最親民

若從「入手門檻」觀察，像是006208、0050這類高含積量傳統ETF雖然績效出色，但入場門檻相對較高，以006208最新收盤價209.75元計算，一張成本高達近21萬元，對於規畫長期存股的小資族而言，可能需要更充裕的資金準備才能有效投資。

而根據CMoney最新統計，目前含積量3成以上、股價低於30元的台股「高積低價」ETF共計6檔，包括中信臺灣智慧50（00912）、凱基台灣TOP50（009816）、玉山市值動能50（009803）、華南永昌優選50（009808）、凱基優選30（00938），以及富邦淨零ESG50（009809）。

以009803為例，最新收盤價為19.16元，等同不到2萬元即可買進一張，今年來更大漲49.57%，績效表現亮眼，絲毫不遜於其他老牌市值型ETF；若觀察009816，股價僅13.05元，相當於一張約1.3萬元即可入手，自今年2月掛牌以來即引爆投資人搶進熱潮，上市不到3個月資產規模便突破千億元，今年以來績效亦達3成水準，讓小資族也能以低門檻間接參與台積電行情。

馮萱榕／財經特派記者，主跑財政部、電腦通路、觀光餐飲等
